# ITLibMediaItemLyricsContentRating.clean

**Case**

The media item lyrics don’t contain explicit language.

## Declaration

```swift
case clean
```

## Media Item Lyric Content Ratings

- **ITLibMediaItemLyricsContentRating.none**: There is no rating information for the media item lyrics.
- **ITLibMediaItemLyricsContentRating.explicit**: The media item lyrics contain explicit language.
